description: Style Note Visudh kurtas take care of your ethnic look with great styling and comfortable fits. Sport a traditional look by pairing this kurta with black leggings or contrast leggings and a pair of ethnic slip on sandals. Product Description Green printed kurta, has a round neckline with a V dip in front, stitched detailing at the yoke and cuffs, sleeves till below the elbows and side slits Material and Care Blended fabric Wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight or iron on print and embroidery Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and chest 33") is wearing a size M
